title: Sarcorhachis obtusa
taxonomy: Sarcorhachis obtusa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It belongs to the genus Sarcorhachis, which is a monotypic genus. The plant is native to tropical Africa and is known for its distinctive flowers. The classification of Sarcorhachis obtusa is further supported by its morphological characteristics and molecular analysis. Further research is needed to fully understand the taxonomic relationships within this species.
